title: acetosella zonata
intro: Acetosella zonata, also known as the zonate moonwort or moonwort fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acetosella zonata are said to include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, among others. In herbal preparations, Acetosella zonata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
